_doc: Execution logs end abruptly mid-Delay — no Job Completed line. The last user-workflow message is the start of the long-running step. The Robot Service then logs the kill request and the abrupt exit.

Data.Message: Job 'a1c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789aaaaa' (ReleaseName=LongRunningProcess) ended with unexpected exit code 0x40010004. The executor was terminated externally; no graceful shutdown was performed.
[Robot] Stop request received for job 'a1c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789aaaaa' (strategy=Kill). Terminating executor process.
[LongRunningProcess] Starting long-running work — 5 minute delay simulates a slow inference or batch step.
Job 'a1c0b2c3-d4e5-4678-9012-3456789aaaaa' (ReleaseName=LongRunningProcess) entering Running state on MOCK-HOST.
